Services

Services for high-stakes technical mandates.

RB AYOUB Solutions Inc. provides senior architecture and technical advisory services for organizations that need clarity before committing to build, scale, integrate, or govern complex systems.

01

Architecture Review & Technical Assessment

A structured review of existing systems, architecture decisions, integration points, technical debt, scalability risks, security concerns, and delivery constraints.

Deliverables

  • Architecture assessment memo
  • Risk register
  • Current-state system map
  • Priority recommendations
  • Executive summary
02

Solution & Enterprise Architecture

Design of target architecture for platforms, products, modernization programs, and enterprise systems.

Deliverables

  • Target architecture
  • C4 diagrams
  • Service boundaries
  • API and integration contracts
  • Architecture decision records
  • Implementation roadmap
03

AI & Agentic Systems Architecture

Architecture for AI-enabled systems, LLM integrations, RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, evaluation, auditability, and governance.

Deliverables

  • AI system architecture
  • Workflow and orchestration model
  • Data and context governance design
  • Evaluation and observability plan
  • Risk controls for production use
04

Cloud, Platform & Integration Architecture

Cloud-native architecture, platform foundations, Kubernetes, CI/CD, observability, API platforms, and event-driven integration.

Deliverables

  • Cloud/platform blueprint
  • Deployment and environment model
  • Integration architecture
  • Operational readiness review
  • Security and observability recommendations
05

Blockchain, Tokenization & Regulated Systems

Architecture for blockchain-enabled systems where auditability, token lifecycle, smart contracts, payment integration, or regulatory constraints matter.

Deliverables

  • Tokenization architecture
  • Smart contract system design
  • Audit trail model
  • Regulatory and operational risk notes
  • Integration design
06

Documentation, SOW & Technical Governance

Decision-grade documentation for teams, executives, clients, vendors, and procurement contexts.

Deliverables

  • SRS / HLSD
  • C4 model
  • ADR register
  • Statement of work support
  • Technical estimates
  • Delivery governance model

Engage a mandate

Discuss a mandate
RB AYOUB Solutions Inc.

Senior architecture for complex systems.

Based in Laval, Québec.
